cases.title: Private Medical Clinic
cases.description: Clinic MCP wired to calendar, Stripe, and patient records. A WhatsApp agent books, cancels, and confirms payments in warm Mexican Spanish. Staff focuses on care, not phones. NOM-024 and LFPDPPP compliant from day one.
cases.quote: Patients book at 2am. Payments confirmed before they arrive. Our staff focuses on care, not phones.

cases.title: Loyalty Programs Company
cases.description: Full Node for a 20-year loyalty platform serving major banks. 41 processes automated. The consumer-MCP layer extends agent access to end users — the platform becomes a distribution channel for the Ajolote network, not a terminal client.
cases.quote: 12 weeks from manual chaos to fully automated operations. Every process proves 95% precision before replacing the human.

cases.title: Premium Spirits Brand
cases.description: SME Node wired to distributor feeds, SAT, and inventory. A cash-flow agent forecasts receivables; a stockout agent turns distributor data into negotiation leverage across multiple US states. The SAT MCP drops into the library for every future Mexican client.
cases.quote: Every shipment decision is now backed by data, not guesswork.
